text: Created ticket Scaffold pi-ralph package and run ledger

A delegated isolated task created `packages/pi-ralph/package.json`, `extensions/index.ts`, and the core `paths.ts`, `models.ts`, and `store.ts` files. The store was verified against a fresh temp workspace to initialize the ledger and create/read/list a run with the expected artifact skeleton.

Implemented `packages/pi-ralph` foundation files plus workspace wiring: package metadata, README, LICENSE, extension lifecycle hooks, durable `.loom/ralph/` ledger initialization, core path/model/store code, and root `package.json`/`README.md` integration. Verified through package test suite, targeted lint, and workspace typecheck.
